sessions.summary: Project inception — full architecture discussion, all decisions locked. Repo: PandaDesign-in/bot. App: PandaAI. Stack: vanilla JS, no npm, GitHub backend, AES-256-GCM, Groq 8B/70B/Whisper, Three.js viewer, all CAD formats.
